references.name: 1950s-60s Mid-Century Modern / Googie Architecture
observedPatterns: Pastel color palettes with coral, mint, and cream
Boomerang and atomic starburst decorative shapes
adaptedElements: Sidebar designed as vintage jukebox menu with colorful active states
Atomic starburst SVG brand icon with CSS rotation
Springy elastic GSAP hover animations mimicking playful 50s energy
Pastel-bordered cards with boomerang corner accents
Rounded pill-shaped buttons with 3D shadow press effect
Warm cream background with dot-grid whiteboard patterns
